overall.description: A cinematic static shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic corporate cityscape across a calm canal. The scene features towering glass skyscrapers, a prominent building with green neon signage, and a flying vehicle passing through the sky. The lighting suggests early morning with soft clouds and reflective water.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade overlooking corporate district

events.description: flying vehicle enters from right side of frame and traverses across the sky

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cyberpunk city skyline from across the waterfront canal

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle moving horizontally from right to left across the sky above the city

entered.detail: large dark corporate building with green neon signage reading 'softsys' on the facade
group of tall futuristic glass and steel towers with reflective surfaces
tall slender skyscraper standing apart from the central cluster
calm reflective canal water mirroring the sky and buildings

segments.scene_description: A serene panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape viewed from across a calm waterfront. The prominent Softsys corporate building dominates the right side with its green neon signage, while a cluster of glass skyscrapers rises in the center. Around the 12-second mark, a flying vehicle enters from the right and cruises across the sky, adding dynamic movement to the otherwise static corporate vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a serene panoramic view of a futuristic corporate cityscape that remains steady as a single dynamic element disrupts the stillness. It begins with a wide gaze across a calm waterfront, where the towering glass skyscrapers of the city center are framed by the prominent Softsys corporate building and its glowing green neon signage. As the camera holds this static vista, the quiet atmosphere shifts when a flying vehicle enters from the right. The scene then follows the vehicle as it cruises smoothly across the sky, adding a layer of motion to the reflective water and towering architecture before the craft exits the frame.
